Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer head to 10,000 feet elevation to catch some ice out Colorado trout. Its freezing but the fishing is hot!
Video.grandparentTitle: Ice Off Trout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim explains how effective drop shotting can be for largemouth bass when the bass are keying in on bedding bluegills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Jiggin' & Drop Shottin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank is headed to SC to spend a day with some of his favorites young pals at The Boy's Farm in Newberry. Hank & the boys target stripers on beautiful Lake Murray.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Fishing for stripers on Lake Murray
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kids with life-threatenting illnesses are in need of help & hope. Today Hank shares his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Making dreams a reality
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank shares the water with some youth bass anglers. He teaches the anglers how to read and fish new water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Alabama Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker goes after the fish on Lake Monticello with friend Bobby Williams.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Monticello
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day catching fish with well-known Christian author Dennis Rainey.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Grosse Savanne Bass Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank and close friend/business partner, Keith Kelly return to Hank's premiere signature lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: Big Bass at Rockhouse Farms
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fom South Carolina to Texas, today's show covers 1,500 miles of bass fishing & baseball fun. Hank's grandson pitcher, Alec takes a break from sports camp to join "pawpaw."
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Outdoors: 'Pitching' for bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank sets out with two next-generation fishermen... high schoolers with a hunger for the outdoors. He shares his tricks of the trade as he & his young friends land some big bass using a variety baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker: High School Bassin'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hank Parker spends a day on Lake Hartwell chasing after the fish and sharing his boat with Outdoor Dream Foundation friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing - Lake Hartwell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Image.alt: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake

Video.summary: If you want to catch walleye after walleye including big fish too, plan a trip to Q Lake Lodge. Watch Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson catch fish from dawn until dusk, shallow and deep, using a variety of classic walleye presentation options.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Q Lake Lodge Giant Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The team heads down to Florida for a flats boat fly fishing in the mangroves of the Everglades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sport FishingTV | Fly Fishing The Everglades
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Groupers To Go
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Groupers to Go
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. Joined by long-time friend Sebastian Lizotte, the day unfolds into an exhilarating fishing adventure with non-stop walleye action—over 60 catches in a single day! This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Host, Kim Stricker provides some underwaer insight while experiencing a substancial mayfly hatch in Indian River, MI. Mullett Lake is well-known for big smallmouth and the emerging bugs triggered feeding activity on the water's surface.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Indian River Hex Hatch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we find everyones favorite fish...sheephead. but were going out in search of Giants!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Sheephead Smackdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Keith Lorensen is no stranger to water, he spent many years at sea during his service in the U.S. Navy. Back in October of 2000, Keith was injured during a terrorist attack on the historic USS Cole.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Navy Veteran Keith Lorensen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Veteran Tournament Angler and Lake Okeechobee guide, Tom Mann Jr. joins Kim to discuss the environmental challenges this ecological treasure has endured. In the process they demonstrate the famed fishery is triving.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook n' Look — Okeechobee, Alive and Well
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Unrelenting heat, prior to the onset of an El Nińo winter presents a challenge to Kim and his son Danny on Florida's Big "O". Small bass abound, yet the element of finesse ultimately lures better quality. Strike King's "Rage Bug" is featured.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Jungle Hot
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Ty Sjodin have so much fun in North Dakota where the feedbag is on.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Fantastic Fishing In North Dakota
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Before the age of 23, U.S. Marine Jeff Francis filled out a total of three wills. His tours of duty not only protected our freedom but also created positive change for a country in need. When he came home, the transition back into civilian life proved to be difficult. For Jeff, his service dog Fox has become much more than just man's best friend.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran Jeff Francis and Fox
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The story of a Wisconsin soldier who reveals his real-life struggles as a 37-month prisoner of war during the Korean War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Korean War POW Darrell Krenz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The night bite in Sturgeon Bay is on fire! In this week's episode, we’re meeting with our good friends Lonney Goman from Greenbay Trophy Fishing and Scott Meiller from Rebel Converting to catch some walleye. Hold onto your hineys folks, this will be a long night!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Night Fishing Walleye

Video.summary: This past summer (2019), we met a new friend Jason, the CEO of the Catalina Island medical center in the city of Avalon. Jason mentioned that he was in charge of a campaign for the Catalina Island Medical Center Foundation. This campaign aims to raise money to build Catalina Island, a much-needed, state-of-the-art medical center. Jason asked us if we could be one of the big-ticket auction items from the list. We would provide a three-night stay on the stoked on a fishing yacht, two days of fishing on our Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot everglades, and provide fantastic food and drinks when we arrived back in Avalon. We love Catalina, and the idea of creating a hospital for the future of the Island was a no-brainer. We couldn't let this great opportunity go to waste and had epic two days of fishing in San Clemente Island with some new friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked On Fishing
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip
Stoked on Fishing — $22,000 Catalina Island Dream Trip

Video.summary: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin is off to Central Florida to fish with veteran angler Bernie Schultz.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Feel the Bern
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you, in detail how to build your own Ned Rig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building A Ned Rig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Finding Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Four
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy takes you on a tour of the Wonders of Wildlife Museum in Missouri.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Learning About Wildlife
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jimmy is Striper Fishing on Lake Texoma in Texas. One of 7 lakes in the country where striper spawn.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jimmy Houston Fishing - Striper Express
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks charter fishing with Capt. Steve Hunsucker of the Reel Deal Sportfishing charter in Clearwater, Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio | Capt. Steve Hunsucker
Video.title: Episode 1
